benchmark_min_version_reason: Stable versions before 0.8.0 either fail before emitting a provider request or lack the stable noninteractive JSON/local-base-url capture path used by the benchmark.

benchmark_exclusions.0.24.2: Broken npm package metadata points @google/gemini-cli-core at file:../core, so the published CLI cannot start after install.

capture.notes: The runner writes an isolated ~/.gemini/settings.json selecting Gemini API key auth, disables telemetry/autoupdate/sandboxing, trusts only the generated benchmark workspace, maps container localhost to Docker's host gateway so newer Gemini CLI releases accept a localhost recorder URL, and points GOOGLE_GEMINI_BASE_URL at the local recorder with a dummy GEMINI_API_KEY. The CLI sends Gemini generateContent traffic to the recorder; no Google upstream model call is made.
